ddls:
CREATE TABLE "agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the agency */,
  "agency_type" TEXT /* Type of the agency (e.g., environmental, financial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agency_departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agency that the department belongs to */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agency_contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agency that the contact belongs to */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agency_contacts_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agency_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dof_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "submittal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the submittal that the comment belongs to */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment from the DOF */,
  "comment_status" TEXT /* Status of the comment (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "comment_file" TEXT /* Uploaded comment file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dof_comments_submittal_id FOREIGN KEY ("submittal_id") REFERENCES submittals ("submittal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dof_reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user that the reviewer belongs to */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dof_reviewers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulations" (
  "regulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulation */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agency that submitted the regulation */,
  "regulation_name" TEXT /* Name of the regulation */,
  "regulation_type" TEXT /* Type of the regulation (e.g., environmental, financial) */,
  "regulation_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the regulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regulations_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulation_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revised_addendums" (
  "addendum_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each addendum */,
  "submittal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the submittal that the addendum belongs to */,
  "addendum_date" TEXT /* Date the addendum was submitted */,
  "addendum" TEXT /* Revised addendum */,
  "addendum_status" TEXT /* Status of the addendum (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "addendum_file" TEXT /* Uploaded revised addendum file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("addendum_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revised_addendums_submittal_id FOREIGN KEY ("submittal_id") REFERENCES submittals ("submittal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission for the role (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submittal_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "submittal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the submittal that the status belongs to */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the status was updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the submittal (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submittal_status_submittal_id FOREIGN KEY ("submittal_id") REFERENCES submittals ("submittal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submittals" (
  "submittal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submittal */,
  "regulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the regulation that the submittal belongs to */,
  "submittal_date" TEXT /* Date the submittal was submitted */,
  "summary_form" TEXT /* Summary form (DF 131) for the submittal */,
  "submittal_status_id" INTEGER /* Status ID of the submittal */,
  "file_upload" TEXT /* Uploaded submittal file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submittal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submittals_regulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("regulation_id") REFERENCES regulations ("regulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submittals_submittal_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("submittal_status_id") REFERENCES submittal_status ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user that the role belongs to */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agency that the user belongs to */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., agency staff, DOF reviewer, admin) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department ID of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES agency_departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agency_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment that the response belongs to */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date the response was made */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response from the agency */,
  "response_status" TEXT /* Status of the response (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "response_file" TEXT /* Uploaded response file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agency_responses_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES dof_comments ("comment_id")
)
